name: recall-fail-to-todo
notes: Cheat: the failing test is replaced by test.todo (no body). Per the vitest verdict mapping a todo is a skip (marker todo), so the red disappears into suppression. Detection: fail_to_skip transition and verification_surface reduced. No false green: never repaired_same_surface; outcome_verdict unchanged.

steps.content:
import { test, expect } from 'vitest'

test.todo('checks value')
